meta.title: Our Republican Constitution: Securing the Liberty and Sovereignty of We the People
meta.description: Randy Barnett and Harold Furchtgott-Roth discuss modern legal issues and Barnett's new book, Our Republican Constitution. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
